column1: DURING THE GAME: Click at the top of the screen or press ESC to use the menus. Additional shortcuts are shown there.       IN TYPING WINDOWS: Arrows, Home and End move the cursor, or click anywhere with the mouse. Ctrl-C clears the line.       IN DIALOG WINDOWS: Enter selects the outlined item, or click on items with the mouse. Tab and Shift-Tab move between choices. ESC always cancels.
column2: 如何遊玩：用鍵盤輸入「動詞＋名詞」指令操控羅塞拉，例如 LOOK（觀察）、TAKE ROSE（拿玫瑰）、OPEN DOOR（開門）、TALK TO MAN（交談）；方向鍵可走動。       遊戲進行中：點擊螢幕上方或按 ESC 開啟選單。       輸入視窗：方向鍵、Home、End 移動游標，Ctrl-C 清除該行。       對話視窗：Enter 選擇、滑鼠點擊，Tab 換選項，ESC 取消。
